transcript: it's gonna take up a lot of your food budget to meal plan before you go grocery shopping make a list of what you're gonna make that week three cook once eat twice do a few extra chicken breasts and you can maybe slice that up and put it on a salad the next day for lunch or the next night you can make some quesadillas for buy in bulk but be sure you'll use everything that you buy before it expires otherwise you're not saving this is especially true when you're buying produce so if you find your produce is going to waste
